commits.subject: docs(0.8.20): Slice 10 close — R-20-RV + R-20-NV; TC-31 resolved; TC-32 accepted

mandate: DOCS-ONLY closure for Slice 10: update dev/plans/plan-0.8.20.md and dev/plans/runs/STATUS-0.8.20.md to record the verified Slice-10 close, correct three board inaccuracies, and commit the untracked closure artifacts plus the ledgerwrite-appended TC ledger. Touch no source and no test files.

STATUS header + §1: Slice-5 'awaiting Steward land' corrected to LANDED at 1f8ed8bf; in-flight/status/blocks/next-action switched to Slice 10.

STATUS §12 (new): Slice-10 close section mirroring Slice 5's §11 shape — what shipped, schema 21->22, gates, the honest Python comparison, the PROPOSED/NOT SIGNED surface delta, codex §9 rounds, what is owed to the HITL, closure artifacts.
Committed the four untracked artifacts (two closure JSONs, two codex transcripts) and the ledgerwrite-appended TC ledger + its .seq companion. The ledger was NOT hand-edited.

gates.scripts/agent-lint-md.sh: exit 0 — BUT VACUOUS IN THIS WORKTREE: node_modules/.bin/markdownlint-cli2 is absent and lychee is absent, so the script self-skipped its checks. Reported as a vacuous green, not a real one.
gates.markdownlint-cli2 (real run, binary borr: exit 1 overall — 9 errors, ALL in dev/research/personal-agent-database-market-2026-07-02.md, which is pre-existing, untouched by this commit (empty git diff), and last modified in c366d6e0. ZERO errors in dev/plans/plan-0.8.20.md. dev/plans/runs/** is excluded by the repo .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc ignore list, so STATUS-0.8.20.md is out of markdownlint scope by config.

discrepancies_found.measured_from_git: the 'allowlist' array in src/conformance/governed-surface-allowlist.json goes 25 -> 27 (baseline ae44770f vs HEAD), adding exactly read.crossed_boundary_since and read.crossedBoundarySince; 'core' unchanged at 5; 'recovery_denylist' unchanged at 5
discrepancies_found.resolution: Wrote the git-measured figure (25 -> 27 array entries) and described it precisely as the allowlist array count. The 31 -> 33 figure may refer to the live introspected command surface, which cannot be verified without running the bindings. Flagged for the orchestrator rather than silently reconciled.
discrepancies_found.severity: low — the delta CONTENT (two command names, two types, denylist unchanged at five) matches exactly; only the cardinality basis differs

discrepancies_found.measured_from_git: 18 commits in ae44770f..93a57b10 — the task's list omits 9392dbc5 (TC-31 fix-1), 073b2d3a (fix-2 closure artifact), and a6c849ee (fix-3 closure artifact)
discrepancies_found.resolution: Recorded the full git-verified list of 18 in STATUS §12.1.

open_decisions_recorded: TC-34 (#15) — node validity has NO write-side authoring verb; queryable but not settable from any SDK, tests author windows via direct SQL. Is R-20-NV met without it?
TC-33 (#16) — temporal-model split: node validity INTEGER epoch vs shipped edge t_valid/t_invalid ISO-8601 TEXT. Accept long-term, or schedule a unifying slice?
#17 — Slice-10 governed-surface delta awaits HITL sign-off, as does Slice 5's AC-079 (#7), which still blocks publish
TC-32 carry-forward caveat — the erasure guarantee must NOT be stated unconditionally to users while co-named-entity dedupe stands
TC-35 / TC-36 — logged in the TC ledger, no decision needed
notes: Docs-only closure, one commit, output.json written last. Two things the orchestrator should read: (1) scripts/agent-lint-md.sh returns exit 0 in this worktree WITHOUT LINTING ANYTHING — markdownlint-cli2 and lychee are both absent here, so the script self-skips; a real lint was obtained by borrowing the primary checkout's binary, and plan-0.8.20.md is clean while STATUS-0.8.20.md is outside markdownlint scope by repo config. This is a live vacuous-green trap in any worktree without node_modules. (2) The allowlist cardinality in the task brief (31 -> 33) does not match what git shows for the allowlist array (25 -> 27); the delta's content matches exactly, so this is a counting-basis question, not a substantive one. Both are recorded under discrepancies_found rather than reconciled away.
